name: The Headsmen's Curse
inspire: After an Action step, if damage was inflicted on any condemned enemy fighters by a friendly fighter's Attack, Inspire that friendly fighter.

reactions.name: Trial and Execution
reactions.trigger: At the start of your first Action step in each battle round, you can pick an enemy fighter within 5 hexes of a friendly Scriptor of the Sentence to be condemned for that battle round. After a condemned enemy fighter is slain, you can draw a number of Power cards equal to that fighter's Bounty characteristic.
reactions.flavorText: The Headsmen's Curse seek out mortals to condemn to eternal punishment.
reactions.rulesText: At the start of your first Action step in each battle round, you can pick an enemy fighter within 5 hexes of a friendly Scriptor of the Sentence to be condemned for that battle round. After a condemned enemy fighter is slain, you can draw a number of Power cards equal to that fighter's Bounty characteristic.

abilities.name: Eternal Duty
abilities.flavorText: There can be no rest for the court. Their duty compels them to endless service.
abilities.rulesText: Use this immediately after an enemy fighter is slain by your leader's ({icon:leader}) weapon. Pick a slain friendly fighter. Raise that fighter and place them in an empty hex adjacent to your leader ({icon:leader}). You can only use this ability once per game.

abilities.name: Whet the Blade
abilities.flavorText: With an eerie scraping sound, ancient stone is drawn across spectral steel.
abilities.rulesText: Use this immediately after you pick a weapon as part of your leader's ({icon:leader}) Attack if they are adjacent to a friendly Sharpener of the Blade. That weapon has Grievous ({icon:grievous}) for that Attack. You can only use this ability once per game.

abilities.name: Discorporate
abilities.flavorText: If given the order, the Nighthaunt can flicker between the realms of the living and dead.
abilities.rulesText: Pick a friendly fighter to use this Core ability. Remove that fighter from the battlefield and then place them in an empty hex. You can only use this ability once per game.

abilities.name: Cackling Court
abilities.flavorText: The caterwauling and accusations from the Nighthaunt can rattle even the most stalwart souls.
abilities.rulesText: Use this immediately after you pick an enemy fighter to be the target of an Attack if that fighter is Flanked and/or Surrounded. Rolls of both {icon:fury} and {icon:dodge} are successes in that Attack roll. You can only use this ability once per game.
